Sender: P. Lacau, Director General of the Antiquities Service
Recipient: Monsieur E. Baraize, Directeur de Travaux
Brief_Summary: This service order from the Director General allocates L.E. 60 for the construction of a storehouse at Medamoud and confirms a L.E. 500 credit for work at Medinet Habu, instructing that work should resume when M. Baraize is available and in consultation with M. Breasted.
English_Translation:
SERVICE ORDER N°387.

CREDIT-

ANTIQUITIES SERVICE
General Directorate

SERVICE ORDER N°.[Pencil note: 424]

1°.- Construct a storehouse for the sculpture fragments at Medamoud. Include a room for the ghaffir (watchman).

Credit ..... L.E. 60

2°.- For Medinet Habu, maintain the credit of L.E. 500 (letter of 11 February 1925, N°22.20/17) instead of L.E. 200 (service order N°422).

Resume work when M. Baraize is freer; consult with M. Breasted to inconvenience him as little as possible.

Cairo, 4 March 1925.

THE DIRECTOR GENERAL,

[Handwritten Arabic: س]
[Handwritten Arabic: س]

[Pencil note: 4.22-20/17] Copy transmitted to M. Baraize for necessary action.

THE DIRECTOR GENERAL,
[Handwritten Arabic: علم]
[Handwritten signature: Placau]
Stamps_and_Annotations: Pencil note: 424 (overwriting the blank service order number)
Pencil note: 4.22-20/17 (filing reference for the copy)
Confidence_Notes: The handwritten Arabic notes are administrative marks and have not been translated beyond their general description.
Full_Transcription:
--ORDRE DE SERVICE N°387.
                                                                    --CREDIT-

SERVICE DES ANTIQUITES
Direction Générale

ORDRE DE SERVICE N°.[Pencil note: 424]

1°.- Faire un magasin pour les débris des
sculptures à Medamoud. Joindre une chambre
pour le gaffir.
                                                                    Crédit ..... L.E. 60

2°.- Pour Médinet Habou maintenir le crédit
de L.E. 500 (lettre du 11 Février 1925,
N°22.20/17) au lieu de L.E.200 (ordre de
service N°422).

Reprendre le travail quand M.Baraize
sera plus libre; étudier avec M.Breasted
pour le gêner le moins possible.

                                                                    Le Caire, le 4 Mars 1925.

                                                                    LE DIRECTEUR GENERAL,

                                                                    [Handwritten Arabic: س]
                                                                    [Handwritten Arabic: س]

--------------------
[Pencil note: 4.22-20/17] Copie transmise à M.Baraize pour la suite
nécessaire.

                                                                    LE DIRECTEUR GENERAL,
[Handwritten Arabic: علم]
                                                                    [Handwritten signature: Placau]
